scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run dev -w apps/website"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run dev -w apps/website" "cd apps/backend && make dev"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/design-tokens && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && cd apps/backend && pytest
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && cd apps/backend && ruff check .
